title: Founder Marketplace
brief_text: Need something modern for everyone. Maybe web or mobile. Want it to feel premium and grow fast.

title: Founder Enterprise MVP
brief_text: Need a minimal MVP in 2 weeks for a solo founder budget. Also need enterprise SSO, audit logs, permissions, analytics, billing, and mobile support. Keep it cheap and fast.

title: Founder B2B Tool
brief_text: We want a B2B workflow tool for customer success teams. The product should help reduce churn and improve onboarding. We need a simple first release but the commercial model is still undecided.

title: Founder Health Portal
brief_text: We need a portal for patient and clinic coordination. It should move fast, feel easy, and support sensitive customer data. I have not decided whether this starts as web or mobile.

title: Founder All In One
brief_text: Build an all-in-one dashboard for sales, support, analytics, and billing. It needs to be fast, cheap, and packed with features. Budget is under $5k and this MVP is expected in 2 weeks.

title: Перегруженный русский MVP
brief_text: Нужен простой MVP за 2 недели. Бюджет до $8k, команда из 2 человек. При этом нужен веб и мобильное приложение, Slack, CRM, биллинг, аналитика и роли доступа. Нужно сделать быстро и недорого.

title: Realistic Overloaded English MVP
brief_text: Need a simple MVP for a service business within 10 days. Budget is under $5k and the team is just two people. From day one it must include web and mobile apps, Salesforce, Slack, Stripe, analytics, admin reporting, permissions, and billing. Please keep it cheap and move fast.

title: Реалистично перегруженный русский MVP
brief_text: Нужен простой MVP для сервисного бизнеса в короткий срок, максимум за 2 недели. Бюджет маленький, до $4k, и команда всего 2 человека. С первого релиза нужны веб и мобильное приложение, CRM, Slack, Stripe, аналитика, роли доступа, админка и отчеты. Нужно сделать быстро и недорого.
